fields.label: Economics (General)
fields.description: Microeconomics, macroeconomics, econometrics, economic theory, labour, public, international, development economics

fields.label: Behavioural/Experimental Economics
fields.description: Economic decision-making with experimental methods. Must have explicit economic framing: utility, incentives, markets, auctions, game theory
exclusions: General JDM without economic framing → Psychology (Cognitive)

fields.label: Business Administration
fields.description: Management, strategy, operations, supply chain, accounting, finance, entrepreneurship, innovation

fields.label: Marketing
fields.description: Marketing strategy, consumer behaviour, branding, advertising, market research, sales, pricing
fields.exclusions: Social-psychological theory in psychology venues → Social Psychology

fields.label: Business Informatics
fields.description: Information systems, enterprise systems, digital transformation, IT management
exclusions: Business AI without IS focus → Computer Science/Business Admin

fields.label: Public Finance
fields.description: Government budgets, taxation, public expenditure, fiscal policy
